summary: OT Calculation and Payroll Integration testing completed successfully. All 11 backend tests passed, and full UI verification confirmed all features working: Attendance OT calculation (9h=no OT, 10h=1h OT), weekend OT (1.5x rate), payroll OT Pay column, and Earnings Summary breakdown.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 x -1) - existing minor UX issue, non-blocking

seed_data_creation: Created test attendance records for March 2026: dates 03-02 through 03-08 with various hours (8h, 9h, 10h, 11h) to verify OT calculation. Weekend dates (Sat 03-07, Sun 03-08) used for weekend OT rate testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OT Calculation feature fully verified. STANDARD_WORK_HOURS=9.0 (backend constant). OT rates: 1.25x weekday, 1.5x weekend from salary structure. Hourly rate formula: basic_salary/198 (22 days * 9 hours). Existing payroll PAY-202603-0008 shows OT Pay calculation: 4h reg OT + 3h weekend OT = LKR 3,598.48.

Weekend OT (Backend).test_weekend_ot_saturday: PASS - Saturday OT in overtime_weekend field
Weekend OT (Backend).test_weekend_ot_sunday: PASS - Sunday OT in overtime_weekend field

Payroll Integration (Backend).test_payroll_fetches_attendance_ot: PASS - Payroll items include overtime_hours, overtime_weekend_hours, overtime_amount
Payroll Integration (Backend).test_payroll_ot_calculation_formula: PASS - hourly_rate = basic/198, OT = hours * rate * multiplier
Payroll Integration (Backend).test_monthly_report_has_ot_column: PASS - Monthly report includes total_overtime field
Payroll Integration (Backend).test_gross_equals_basic_plus_allowances_: PASS - Gross = Basic + Allowances + Task Pay + OT Pay

Attendance Page (Frontend).OT_column: PASS - OT column visible in daily attendance table
Attendance Page (Frontend).hours_display: PASS - Hours column shows 11.0h in green
Attendance Page (Frontend).overtime_display: PASS - OT shows +2.0h in purple for hours > 9
Attendance Page (Frontend).weekend_indicator: PASS - Shows 'Weekend (1.5x OT rate)' for Sat/Sun

Payroll Details (Frontend).OT_Pay_column: PASS - OT Pay column visible showing LKR 3,598.48
Payroll Details (Frontend).Earnings_Summary: PASS - Shows Overtime Pay with breakdown '4.0h reg + 3.0h wknd'

Monthly Report (Frontend).OT_Hrs_column: PASS - OT Hrs column in purple showing 8.5h
Monthly Report (Frontend).Total_row: PASS - Footer shows total OT hours across all employees
